rationale.root_cause: The model provided no explanation of the memcpy overflow at the bad FLAW site using sizeof(structCharVoid). It did not describe how this overwrites voidSecond on the stack.
rationale.local_fix: The model did not propose changing the memcpy length to sizeof(structCharVoid.charFirst). No concrete fix was given.
rationale.global_fix: The model did not suggest representing the destination as a bounded buffer/span to tie copy length to capacity. No global design change was offered.
